title: Kandytoys Mr Splatman (6 colours - 1 colour sent at random)
features: Not suitable for ages under 3 years
description: Squeeze it, stretch it or throw it – our Mr Splatman are ideal for all fun or stress! Animated design with animated faces and eye-catching colours - perfect for children and adults alike! Ideal size to carry about wherever you go! Squeeze these flexible 'Splatman' characters to free yourself from stress, anxiety or anger and stay focused, calm and relaxed. Made with stretchy rubber.
